headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -26.6)
key_insights: Optimism trending down 37% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 131 quotes and 95 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 45.6 sits in the lower-middle range for the 60-day period, indicating moderate but not extreme levels.

• Optimism improved from yesterday's low but remains negative, while fears dropped significantly to near the 60-day minimum.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
